generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a practical-minded American, I've always believed in being prepared. But let's be honest - the current push for massive civil defense spending is just political theater. We already have strong deterrence through our alliances. Why divert resources from real security needs to build bunkers that will never be used? Let's focus on smart, effective defense that actually protects us. #NationalSecurity #CommonSense
